info.title: Harvest Portal API
info.description: Read-only endpoints for searching and retrieving agricultural geospatial datasets, organizations, groups, and DataStore records from the Harvest Portal. This is a curated subset of the CKAN Action API covering public, anonymous-accessible read operations only — dataset/resource creation, updates, and deletes, and any account or administrative actions, are intentionally not documented here. See the official CKAN API Guide and DataStore API reference (linked on this page) for the complete action set, authentication, and write operations.

tags.name: DataStore
tags.description: Query tabular data loaded into the CKAN DataStore.

get.description: Searches for datasets matching a query, with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Solr query string, e.g. crop yield

parameters.name: fq
parameters.description: Filter query, e.g. organization:nasa-harvest

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g. metadata_modified desc

parameters.name: rows
parameters.description: Number of results to return

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Result offset for pagination

get.description: Returns the full metadata for a single dataset.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Dataset name or ID

get.description: Returns metadata for a single resource (a file, API, or other data source attached to a dataset).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Resource ID

get.description: Returns the list of organizations publishing data on the portal.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by, e.g. name asc

parameters.name: all_fields
parameters.description: Return full organization details instead of just names

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of organizations to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

get.description: Returns details for a single organization, optionally including its datasets.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Organization name or ID

parameters.name: include_datasets
parameters.description: Include the organization's datasets in the response

get.description: Returns the list of thematic groups datasets can belong to.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field to sort by, e.g. name asc

parameters.name: all_fields
parameters.description: Return full group details instead of just names

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of groups to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

get.description: Returns details for a single thematic group, optionally including its datasets.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Group name or ID

parameters.name: include_datasets
parameters.description: Include the group's datasets in the response

get.description: Returns tags used across datasets on the portal.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Only return tags matching this substring

get.description: Searches the tabular data loaded into the DataStore for a given resource. Only works for resources that have been loaded into the DataStore (most CSV/XLSX resources on this portal).

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: ID of the DataStore-enabled resource

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Full-text search across all fields

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON object of field:value filters, e.g. {"country":"Kenya"}

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Field(s) to sort by, e.g. year desc

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

help.description: URL to this action's help text
